calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-21-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Plaintiff: Spencer Thomas, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Timothy Hunter and Jani Steele.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-Day Notice---------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3 - Invoice for mold inspection----ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Timothy Hunter and Jani Steele as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 726 Fillmore St., #10, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $2,380.00
Costs $235.00 for a Total of $2,615.00
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Plaintiff stipulated for the return of the Exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-28-2005 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2005 Continued To Nov-21-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
